free_text: Investigation of proton channel for decay of giant
was obtained by evaporation on polyethylene foil,
The spectra of photoprotons from the S-32 nucleus are
measured in the bremsstrahlung beam. The upper limit
of the bremsstrahlung spectrum was varied from 17 to
30 MeV in shorter than 1-MeV steps. The spectra are
used to calculate the distribution of transition to
different states of the residual nucleus P-31 and to
determine the corresponding partial photoproton cross
Two duplicate data lines in SUBENT 2 data section
